name: John's Loan & Jewelry Co
description_short: Family-owned Las Vegas pawn shop since 1975 offering collateral-based loans on jewelry, watches, and designer bags with an 8% monthly interest rate.
description_long:
John's Loan & Jewelry is a family-owned and independent pawn shop operating in Las Vegas since 1975, making it one of the longest-established operations in the area. The shop is located in the Sahara Paradise Plaza at 2206 S Paradise Road and specializes in providing quick cash loans secured by personal valuables.

The company's core service is collateral-based lending. Customers can pledge gold jewelry, diamond jewelry, Rolex watches, broken gold jewelry, and high-end designer handbags as security for loans. The shop also buys and sells jewelry, watches, coins, and designer handbags. Loan terms are flexible, ranging from same-day repayment to 90 days or longer with renewal options. The stated interest rate is 8% monthly, with a $5 processing fee applied to loans.

John's distinguishes itself through claims of the "lowest interest rates in Las Vegas" and rapid loan processing—transactions are advertised as taking under 5 minutes. The business maintains specific acceptance and rejection criteria for items, accepting only jewelry, watches, and bags while declining electronics, shoes, computers, sunglasses, and smartphones. Extended hours of operation (9:30 AM to midnight most days) and proximity to public transportation serve the Strip-adjacent customer base.

As a pawn shop, this business is fundamentally a high-interest collateral lender. While 8% monthly interest (approximately 96% APR) is lower than typical payday loans, it remains substantially higher than traditional lending. The service model inherently involves asset liquidation risk—items not redeemed are sold by the shop. This is appropriate for consumers needing immediate cash but should only be used for valuables they can afford to lose or quickly reclaim.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 8% monthly interest rate claimed as lowest in Las Vegas—substantially lower than payday or title loan alternatives
Same-day loan approval and funding in under 5 minutes
Flexible repayment terms from same-day to 90+ days with renewal options
Transparent fee structure: only $5 processing fee plus 8% monthly interest
40+ years in business with family ownership and established reputation in Las Vegas
Extended hours until midnight most days, accommodating working customers
Located near public transit (SDX bus, Monorail, Sahara Express) accessible to non-drivers
cons: 8% monthly interest rate equals ~96% APR, still expensive for longer-term borrowing despite being low for pawn shops
Collateral forfeiture risk—unredeemed items within loan period are sold by the shop without further recourse
Limited acceptable collateral types (jewelry, watches, bags only)—excludes most electronics and personal items
Same-day repayment requires paying full month of interest (8%), creating high cost for ultra-short-term loans
Friday hours drastically reduced to 9:30 AM–3:00 PM, making mid-week access difficult for some customers
best_for: Individuals with valuable jewelry, watches, or designer bags who need emergency cash and can repay within 30-90 days
Customers seeking collateral-based loans who want faster processing than title loan lenders
Las Vegas residents near the Strip or Paradise Road corridor needing immediate funding outside traditional banking hours
People who prefer transparent, predictable interest rates over variable or hidden fees charged by some competitors
diagnosis: John's Loan & Jewelry is best suited for Las Vegas residents with valuable collateral who need emergency cash within 30-90 days and prefer the speed and transparency of pawn lending over payday alternatives. The primary caveat is that 8% monthly interest (~96% APR) remains expensive for longer borrowing periods, and pledged items will be sold if not redeemed, making this appropriate only for valuables customers can afford to reclaim or forfeit.
services: Collateral-based loans secured by gold jewelry
Collateral-based loans secured by diamond jewelry
Collateral-based loans secured by Rolex watches
Collateral-based loans secured by high-end designer handbags
Loan renewals extending beyond 90-day initial term
Extended-hours lending (open until midnight most days)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
